name: react_to_player
description: Decide if the player's dialogue choice/free-text reshapes the open world. Return zero or more consequences.

speaker.description: Display name of the NPC who speaks. Prefer an NPC already in `entities`.

text.description: What the NPC says. Write in the same language as the player's free_text.

choices.description: Optional 2-3 follow-up options for the player.

description.description: Vivid English description of the entity (used for asset generation). NPCs/enemies must be HUMANOID — never animals or non-humanoid monsters.

name.description: Display name for an NPC entity.

role.description: NPC ambient-behaviour role: peasant | guard | villager | merchant. The game engine executes it (wander, face the player, flee from fights; guards intervene). Unknown roles degrade to villager.

position_hint.description: Plausible placement: near_player, distant_east, distant_north, etc.

texture_hash.description: Reuse a cached texture by hash from available_assets.

model_hash.description: Reuse a cached GLB by hash from available_assets.

trigger.description: When the scheduled event fires: next_scene, timer:60s, on_player_action:..

plugin_id.description: Id (sha256) of the active plugin that consumes the event.

event_type.description: Event type from the plugin's events_consumed (e.g. trade_offered).

payload.description: Event payload matching what the plugin's rules read (event.*).
